name: South Central Baddies
overview: With The Idea of Isaiah Carr, a.k.a and the Brain of Reality star Speshel K decides to come together and bring this idea to life and give the hood a way out and a shot of Hollywood "We putting LA on the Map" with 2 strangers meeting and a group of girls with different personalities was it a good idea or disaster?
